subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: What is the capital of Rajasthan and which are some of its famous cities?
question_hi: राजस्थान की राजधानी और इसे स्पष्ट में बताये।
A_en: Jaipur, Udaipur, Jodhpur, Bikaner, Alwar, Bharatpur, Dausa, Sirsa
